info.title: PEA API
info.description: HTTP surface of PEA (Personal Email Archive), a single-user local desktop email archive. The Rust axum engine serves this API in-process to the Svelte SPA over the pea:// scheme. All routes live under /api/v1 (carried by the server base URL below). There is no authentication: the app is single-user and binds to localhost only. To call it over HTTP for scripting or debugging, run the standalone engine (binds 127.0.0.1 only).

servers.description: Standalone engine (pea-engine binary), binds to 127.0.0.1 only. In the desktop app the identical routes are served in-process over the pea:// scheme (no network socket).

get.description: FTS5-backed search when `q` is provided, otherwise a plain filtered list. Pagination and filters are shared across both paths.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Full-text query. Alias: `query`. Empty means list mode.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to match against (e.g. subject,body,from).

parameters.name: matchingStrategy
parameters.description: `all` forces strict AND matching and disables the OR fallback.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Restrict to groups matched by a specific duplicate reason.

post.description: Deletes the non-keeper emails in each supplied group.

post.summary: Add / remove tags on multiple emails

get.description: Full email record with flattened recipients, the related ingestion source (including its stored provider config), the thread, and attachment metadata. The raw .eml bytes are NOT embedded; fetch them from `/archived-emails/{id}/raw`.
Returns a fully self-contained, CSP-locked HTML document with inlined cid images and archived remote assets, plus remote-content asset counts.

get.summary: Download all attachments as a zip

200.description: Zip archive of the email's attachments.

get.description: Rebuilds the original message by splicing hollowed attachment blobs back into the stored copy.

post.summary: Open an attachment in the OS quick-look previewer
post.description: Desktop-only. Materializes the attachment in a temp dir and launches the platform previewer (qlmanage / sushi / xdg-open).

post.summary: Enqueue remote-content archival for an email

get.summary: List archived remote assets for an email

200.description: Remote assets (excluding pending and inlined CSS).

get.summary: Fetch a single previewable remote asset
get.description: Returns the archived asset bytes with hardened security headers. Only `archived` assets of a safe image type are served.

get.summary: Emails with failed / partial remote content

put.description: Merges the supplied fields over the stored settings.

200.description: Object keyed by contact email with the display name as value.

post.summary: Import contacts from CSV or vCard
Unmerge a source from its parent

get.summary: Download a stored file by path

200.description: Counts for the ingestion, indexing and remote-content queues.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

BadGateway.description: A required upstream (GitHub) could not be reached.

body.description: FTS snippet in search mode, empty otherwise.

EmailDetail.description: Full archived email record with relations.

ingestionSource.description: Related ingestion source, including its stored provider config.

provider_config.description: Provider config as a JSON string. For the mbox/eml importers this is just the local file path — no secrets.

attachments.description: Present only when hasAttachments is true.

IngestionSource.description: Ingestion source without its provider config (safe shape).
